title: The Khazar Invasion of Armenia
description: Among the events taking place during this year was the invasion of the Khazars through Bib al-Abw1b,61s on account of the Khagan's daughter, their sweeping down on the Muslims and the Protected Peoples [ahl al-dhimmahl there, and their capture and enslavement-according to what has been mentioned-of more than xoo,ooo persons. They perpetrated a monstrous deed, whose like had never been heard of previously in Islam. Hence, al-Rashid appointed Yazid b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
